TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Fernando Chui Sai-on == ryax sa tay 13 nqu tay 1, Fernando Chui Sai-on, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1957) mrhuw Macau ta' misuw hya' ga Fernando Chui Sai-on, aring ryax tay 20 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2009 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == *ernan*o ¶~ ®ńßui s~…ēai-on == rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, *ernan*o ¶~ ®ńßui s~…ēai-on, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw ma ¶~ ®au ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a *ernan*o ¶~ ®ńßui s~…ēai-on, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. qnxan ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: == Fernando Chui Sai-on == ryax sa tay 13 nqu tay 1, Fernando Chui Sai-on, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1957) mrhuw Macau ta' misuw hya' ga Fernando Chui Sai-on, aring ryax tay 20 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2009 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
